content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — Custom star gate routes ≥4-star users to a direct `itms-apps://...action=write-review` link while diverting unhappy users to a private feedback form (App/RatingGateView.swift:17–23), bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`; metadata also solicits "rate us 5 stars" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple treats review-gating dark patterns as ratings manipulation because they skew App Store scores by filtering out negative feedback. This project has both signals: a pre-screening custom star UI that only sends happy users to the write-review page, and a description explicitly begging for 5 stars. Replace the gate with the system `requestReview()` API (or an ungated feedback flow) and remove the 5-star solicitation from the metadata.
